Localization.Description: A virtual machine is restored from a snapshot

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to commit restoration of virtual machine "{object.name}" from a snapshot on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is being restored from snapshot "{object.value}" in preview mode on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is restored from snapshot "{object.value}" in preview mode on host {event_src.host}
Restoration of virtual machine "{object.name}" from a snapshot is undone on host {event_src.host}
Restoration of virtual machine "{object.name}" from a snapshot is being committed on host {event_src.host}
Restoration of virtual machine "{object.name}" from a snapshot is being undone on host {event_src.host}
Failed to undo restoration of virtual machine "{object.name}" from a snapshot on host {event_src.host}
Failed to restore virtual machine "{object.name}" from snapshot "{object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is restored from snapshot "{object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to restore virtual machine "{object.name}" from snapshot "{object.value}" in preview mode on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is being restored from snapshot "{object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
Restoration of virtual machine "{object.name}" from a snapshot is committed on host {event_src.host}
